data.NEWSSUB: Clarification sought from Ola Electric Mobility Ltd
data.HEADLINE:
The Exchange has sought clarification from Ola Electric Mobility Ltd on March 16, 2026, with reference to news appeared in https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/ dated March 16, 2026 quoting "Ola Electric plans Rs 2,000 cr fundraise for battery arm".

The reply is awaited.
